description: The U.S. military on Thursday attacked major civilian infrastructure in Iran for the first time, hours after President Trump threatened in a prime-time address to bomb the country "back to the Stone Ages."Why it matters: The attack on the B-1 bridge near Tehran signals a widening of the U.S. military's targets and could be a first step toward attacks on energy, water and transportation infrastructure.Trump has said the U.S. could conduct such att

title: How millions in taxpayer dollars are helping fund House members' reelection bids
description: Keep a close eye on the ads that inundate your screens as the 2026 midterm elections heat up. You, the taxpayer, paid for some of them.Why it matters: Each election cycle, incumbent House members use a privilege called "franking" to put millions in taxpayer dollars towards giving their reelection campaigns a thinly veiled boost.In the 2024 election cycle, House offices spent a combined $44 million on franked mail and another $19 million on other

title: USS Tripoli arrives in Middle East with 3,500 troops aboard
description:
The US Central Command has announced on 28 March 2026 that the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli has entered its “area of responsibility”.
The post USS Tripoli arrives in Middle East with 3,500 troops aboard  appeared first on Naval Technology.

title: Iran says it downed two US jets as search for one pilot continues
description: Trump says downing of F-15 will not affect talks as Iranian forces say they also struck an A-10 aircraft near Hormuz.
